comments: Nurse seemed rushed and was always typing on the computer. When I asked questions she was helpful but seemed stressed.
Good care overall. Nurse was attentive at night but I noticed she was often at the computer station.
Felt like I had to wait a long time when I pressed the call button. Nurse said she was finishing charting. Discharge felt rushed.
ED was busy but nurse took time to explain everything. Had to wait a while for discharge papers.
Good care. Quick and efficient. Nurse seemed experienced.
Nurse was nice but seemed overwhelmed. Had to explain my medications to a different nurse at shift change. Not sure all the info was passed along.
Nurse Sarah was wonderful. She explained everything. I could tell she was busy with the computer but she always made time.
Nurses were caring but I felt like my call light wasn't answered quickly. They were always on the computer at the nursing station.
Very good care. Nurse was thorough and checked on me frequently despite being busy.
Nurse was good but I wished they spent more time at my bedside. Seemed like they were always going back to chart on the computer.
Night nurse was great. Day shift felt more rushed. Lots of computer time.
ICU nurses were incredible. Constant attention. I always felt monitored and cared for.
Outstanding care. Nurse Lisa was always there. Explained everything happening with my treatment.
Very good ICU care. Nurses were thorough and communicative despite busy charting demands.
Adequate care. Nothing exceptional. Nurses seemed stressed and on the computer a lot.
